sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n85234" key="polupocu/sths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολῠποξύστης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n85234.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">instrument for removing polypi,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:6:25" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.25</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
